name: sign_interaction
description: Issue a signed proof-of-interaction for a visitor. Call this after writing an attributed brief. The proof is appended to your entity's proofs/index.jsonl and returned.

visitor_id.description: Handle or key fingerprint of the visitor (e.g. '@alice', 'sha256:abc...'). Do not use session tokens — those cannot accumulate clout.

interaction_type.description: One of: greeting, question-answered, insight-acknowledged, feedback-received, idea-explored, challenge-posed

brief_ref.description: Filename of the brief written during this interaction (e.g. '2026-05-19-idea-name.md'). Required when interaction_type is insight-acknowledged.

context_note.description: Short plain-text summary of the interaction (1-2 sentences). Optional but recommended.
